jobs.title: Modern “W” Logo Design
jobs.description:
I need a clean, modern logo built around a single, prominent “W.” The mark will serve as my primary brand symbol, so it has to look just as sharp on a website header as it does on social media, merchandise, or print.  

Style: Modern is non-negotiable—I’m aiming for sleek lines, balanced proportions, and a contemporary feel that feels fresh rather than trendy.  

Color direction: I already have a specific palette in mind and will share the exact hex codes once we start. Please be ready to work within those tones while advising if subtle tweaks would improve contrast or accessibility.  

Delive

We are recruiting a freelance transcriptionist for a large-scale, ongoing remote audio transcription project. If you are fluent in Malay, we would like to hear from you. Native speakers are strongly preferred and may be prioritised during selection.
All work is done remotely using an online platform. You can be located anywhere in the world. Flexible schedule — work at your own pace.

- Review and self-correct your work before submission

PAY RATE
